2964008.title: The Loud House
2964008.description: Het spookprogramma ARGGH komt naar Royal Woods en Lincoln en Clyde gaan kijken./ Lori is het gedoe elke dag van haar broer en zussen zat; ze wil op zichzelf gaan wonen in de garage. Maar wat hemels lijkt, kan anders uitpakken..

2977804.title: The Loud House
2977804.description: After Lincoln gets a pink hand-me-down bike from Lori, he borrows Lynn's cool BMX bike without telling her. // Someone clogged the Loud House toilet and Lincoln sets out to find out whodunit.

2984834.title: The Loud House
2984834.description: The siblings turn to Lisa's genius to help them land a spot on 'Double Dare.' // After secretly reading Luna's diary, Leni and Lincoln become worried about the exploits their sister writes about.

2988759.title: The Loud House
2988759.description: Lincoln is given the responsibility of taking home his classes' tarantula, but it gets loose and wreaks havoc! // Thinking he has the worst chores, Lincoln decides to go on strike until someone will swap chores with him.

3001964.title: The Loud House
3001964.description: Ronnie Anne wants to go downtown. But her grandparents think it's too dangerous, so they decide to spy on her.

3017637.title: The Loud House
3017637.description: Convinced that their scrapbook isn't good enough for Dad's birthday, the Loud kids seek out the perfect gift. // Lily hears the parents mention ice cream if the kids are good, so she uses baby smarts to avert sibling disasters

3017722.title: The Loud House
3017722.description: Lori takes a waitressing job at Dad's restaurant, but it turns out that serving is harder than she anticipated. // Spurred on by a classmate's mocking about Charles, Lana decides to train him to compete in a local dog show.

3024731.title: The Loud House
3024731.description: Lincoln has to get to school on time but getting his sisters out the door proves to be the biggest obstacle of all. // Lincoln is the deciding vote on going to the beach or the amusement park for their family vacation.

3025540.title: The Loud House
3025540.description: The older sisters reluctantly let Lynn into their babysitting club but she quickly proves to be too aggressive.

3026742.title: The Loud House
3026742.description: Lincoln signs his family up for a talent show and they form a band. // It's Dad's annual Take Your Daughter to Work Day so Mom offers to take Lincoln to her work: a dental office.

3027603.title: The Loud House
3027603.description: Clyde gaat steeds op tilt en krijgt een bloedneus als hij Lori ziet. Lincoln vraagt Leni's hulp. // Clyde's vaders fitnessen fanatiek. Lincolns' ouders daarentegen niet. Dat gaat niet goed, vinden hij en zijn zussen.

3039385.title: The Loud House
3039385.description: To get out of doing things they don't like, Lana and Lola secretly switch places and pretend to be the other. // After causing Flip to get hurt, the kids sneak him into the attic to care for him without Mom and Dad knowing.

3005655.title: The Loud House
3005655.description: Aangezien Leni de nodige verrassingen heeft verpest, vertellen de kinderen haar niet over het komende feest van mama.

3045947.title: The Loud House
3045947.description: Lincoln buys a pair sound-canceling ear buds to drown out the sound of his sisters. // After Lynn and Lucy get in a fight, Lincoln agrees to let Lynn bunk in his room but only for a night!

3046664.title: The Loud House
3046664.description: Lincoln asks to borrow Clyde's new gaming system, but Clyde struggles to trust that it's safe with him.

3047646.title: The Loud House
3047646.description: When Lincoln's mom signs him up for peewee football, Lincoln schemes to have Lynn take his spot. // After Lucy reads Lincoln's fortune and claims his day will 'end in disaster', Lincoln becomes a hypochondriac.

3048348.title: The Loud House
3048348.description: It's the Sadie Hawkins dance at school and Lincoln's sisters have accidentally landed him four dates! // When Lincoln and Bobby become friends, Lori sets out to make Bobby jealous by hanging out with Clyde.

3007589.title: The Loud House
3007589.description: De familie Yates komt nieuw in de straat van de Herrie's wonen. Ze zijn werkelijk het ideale gezin. // De kinderen spelen graag spelletjes, maar Lynn wint altijd. Dat haalt de lol eraf en dus willen de anderen er iets aan doen.

3050685.title: The Loud House
3050685.description: Lincoln is tired of his sisters meddling in his business until he's being picked on at school. // Lincoln secretly videos his sister's most embarrassing moments in order to win a video contest at school.

3011218.title: The Loud House
3011218.description: Hit by the realization that her big sister will be going off to college soon, Leni tries to thwart Lori's plans. // Lincoln and Clyde start their own cookie-making business, but realize it's a lot more work than they realized.

3011301.title: The Loud House
3011301.description: Lynn's extreme sports superstitions cause chaos at a professional hockey match. // Unable to part with their childhood toys, the kids try to convince Mom and Dad that they still play with them.

3064331.title: The Loud House
3064331.description: Lincoln plots to take the "perfect" family photo for his parents' anniversary gift. // Lincoln and his sisters bet on who can go the longest without doing their most annoying habits.

3066304.title: The Loud House
3066304.description: Lincoln wishes he had ten brothers instead of ten sisters, and Lisa gives him a glimpse into that reality. // Lola wants to be a part of the siblings' secrets club, but they won't let her in because she's a 'tattle tale'.

3066391.title: The Loud House
3066391.description: Lincoln becomes Luan's clown assistant but starts hogging the spotlight. // The Loud kids set out to show Lisa what is 'fun' about a snow day.

3067333.title: The Loud House
3067333.description: De zussen vragen 'de meester van het overtuigen', ook wel bekend als Lincoln om hen te leren hoe ze pa en ma geld moeten vragen./Lisa ontdekt dat ze een onvoldoende heeft gescoord in sociale vaardigheden. Om te slagen moet ze vrienden maken.

3020423.title: The Loud House
3020423.description: Lana wants to win a race car ride-along with her hero, so she and Lincoln enter to compete in a soap box derby. // When Luan must enroll in a culinary class, Dad uses it to share his passion for cooking with one of his kids.

3023031.title: The Loud House
3023031.description: Er is een stroomstoring in de buurt. Pap en man gaan de buren af en de kinderen besluiten om elkaar een vervolgverhaal te vertellen. // De klas van Lucy gaat op schoolreisje naar het strand.

3024909.title: The Loud House
3024909.description: Lincoln gets a tutor that all his sisters instantly get crushes on, making it impossible for Lincoln to study. // The kids complain about their house, but when a tornado threatens to destroy it, they start to feel differently.

3025358.title: The Loud House
3025358.description: Wanneer Luan haar broers en zussen hoort zeuren over haar humor, besluit ze ermee te stoppen. // Aangezien Leni de nodige verrassingen heeft verpest, vertellen de kinderen haar niet over het komende feest van mama.

3094886.title: The Loud House
3094886.description: When the lights go out in the Loud House, the kids entertain themselves by taking turns telling parts of a story. // Lucy and the Morticians' Club try to thwart plans for a school field trip to the beach.

3094971.title: The Loud House
3094971.description: The siblings turn to Lisa's genius to help them land a spot on 'Double Dare.' // After secretly reading Luna's diary, Leni and Lincoln become worried about the exploits their sister writes about.

3038633.title: The Loud House
3038633.description: Seeing his sisters fight with their roommates, Lincoln suggests a room shuffle based on a compatibility test.

3038932.title: The Loud House
3038932.description: It's the Sadie Hawkins dance at school and Lincoln's sisters have accidentally landed him four dates!

3038955.title: The Loud House
3038955.description: Lincoln and Clyde submit an Ace Savvy comic to a meet-the-creator contest, but are foiled by a surprising nemesis.

3041464.title: The Loud House
3041464.description: When Lincoln's four-year-old sister, Lisa, gets put into his 5th grade class, his social standing is at stake! // Sick of their family van always falling apart, the kids decide to try and trick Dad into buying a cool new van.

3041522.title: The Loud House
3041522.description: Lynn denkt dat Lincoln ongeluk brengt en weet de hele familie daarvan te overtuigen. // Juf Johnson gaat met de klas kikkers ontleden. Lana probeert samen met Lincoln de kikkers te redden van die gruweldaad.

3042615.title: The Loud House
3042615.description: Lincoln buys a pair sound-canceling ear buds to drown out the sound of his sisters. // After Lynn and Lucy get in a fight, Lincoln agrees to let Lynn bunk in his room but only for a night!

2996908.title: The Loud House
2996908.description: Lincoln signs his family up for a talent show and they form a band. // It's Dad's annual Take Your Daughter to Work Day so Mom offers to take Lincoln to her work: a dental office.

2998798.title: The Loud House
2998798.description: When Carol Pingrey's photo gets more likes on social media than Lori's she tries to one-up her.

3003389.title: The Loud House
3003389.description: Lincoln and Clyde submit an Ace Savvy comic to a meet-the-creator contest, but are foiled by a surprising nemesis. // When Lana brings home a new pet, who the kids adore, the four original Loud pets scheme to get rid of him.

3003450.title: The Loud House
3003450.description: Afraid they'll be forgotten, Lincoln and Clyde want to make a splash in the yearbook and crash group photos. // Seeing his sisters fight with their roommates, Lincoln suggests a room shuffle based on a compatibility test.

3005505.title: The Loud House
3005505.description: Lincoln plots to take the "perfect" family photo for his parents' anniversary gift. // Lincoln and his sisters bet on who can go the longest without doing their most annoying habits.

3017332.title: The Loud House
3017332.description: While on a field trip, Lincoln worries that his friend group is splintering. // In order to buy her dream car, Lori becomes a local rideshare driver.

3022167.title: The Loud House
3022167.description: Lincoln en Clyde zijn fan van de rockband Smak en mogen voor het eerst naar een concert van ze.

3038862.title: The Loud House
3038862.description: When Lola learns that Lana is planning their joint birthday, she does everything to stop it. // Lincoln and the Middle School Action News Team solve the mystery of the missing popcorn.

3039676.title: The Loud House
3039676.description: After searching for her next big scientific breakthrough, Lisa discovers Flip is a marvel of modern science. // Luna has to decide between playing in a band with her friends or with playing with professionals.

3043549.title: The Loud House
3043549.description: Lori gaat op visite bij Bobby en Lincoln gaat mee om Ronnie Anne te zien. Lori kan niet goed wennen en Lincoln vindt dat Ronnie Anne is veranderd. // De familie probeert Luan's 1 april grappen te ontlopen door dubbelgangers in te zetten.

3043600.title: The Loud House
3043600.description: Lynn kan kampioen worden met basketbal, als ze in het goede team zit. // Mam en pap willen niet meer in de rij staan voor de badkamer. Dus besluiten ze stiekem een badkamer in de kast van hun slaapkamer te maken.

3043675.title: The Loud House
3043675.description: Iedereen verliest wel eens geld en wie het vindt mag het houden. Dat geldt niet in huize Herrie.

3062708.title: The Loud House
3062708.description: When Luan overhears her siblings complaining about her comedy, she decides to give it up. // Knowing Leni's history of spoiling surprises, the kids don't tell her about Mom's upcoming party.

3047187.title: The Loud House
3047187.description: Dad and Lincoln get on "Legends of the Hidden Temple" and can't wait to for a whole day of father/son bonding. // Lincoln wants to go to the mall but has to watch his younger sisters so he decides to take them to the mall.

3047364.title: The Loud House
3047364.description: Lily heeft een huilbui en is niet stil te krijgen. Dan haalt Lori een pop van vroeger tevoorschijn. // De hele familie zit constant op hun telefoon, tot groot ongenoegen van pap. Totdat hij de voordelen van internet uitgelegd krijgt.

3049797.title: The Loud House
3049797.description: After Lincoln gets a pink hand-me-down bike from Lori, he borrows Lynn's cool BMX bike without telling her. // Someone clogged the Loud House toilet and Lincoln sets out to find out whodunit.

3058096.title: The Loud House
3058096.description: Lincoln is tired of his sisters meddling in his business until he's being picked on at school. // Lincoln secretly videos his sister's most embarrassing moments in order to win a video contest at school.

3061861.title: The Loud House
3061861.description: Plots komen Lori en Leni ook kijken naar de favoriete serie van Lucy. Er zit een nieuw karakter in, waar Lori en Leni fan van zijn. Dat bederft Lucy's kijkplezier. // Als mam weer een parkeerboete krijgt, kiest ze voor een taakstraf.

3061910.title: The Loud House
3061910.description: Om de gymles leuker te maken, gaan Lincoln en Clyde de coach en juf Johnson proberen te koppelen. // Lucy is onzeker over haar gedicht. Luan wil haar vertrouwen geven door haar te vertellen over haar praktijkervaring als comédienne.

3061980.title: The Loud House
3061980.description: Lincoln help Lola zich voor te bereiden op een miss verkiezing.

3063836.title: The Loud House
3063836.description: Lincoln signs his family up for a talent show and they form a band. // It's Dad's annual Take Your Daughter to Work Day so Mom offers to take Lincoln to her work: a dental office.

3063888.title: The Loud House
3063888.description: When a high utility bill threatens Hector and Rosa's annual trip, Ronnie Anne spearheads an effort to lower usage.

3065696.title: The Loud House
3065696.description: The family embarks on a reading challenge at the library but Lola refuses to participate. // When Lincoln discovers the first page of his baby book is blank, he worries his parents are hiding something.

3065765.title: The Loud House
3065765.description: To get Lily to stop crying the kids give her an old singing toy from the attic but it quickly drives them crazy. // Dad declares war on the kids' devices so they decide to show Dad how great electronics and the internet are.

3066685.title: The Loud House
3066685.description: Lana overtuigt de kinderen om naar de Burpin 'Burger te gaan om haar raceheld te ontmoeten, ondanks de zware sneeuwval. // Wanneer Lincoln met Clyde op vakantie gaat, realiseert hij zich hoe overbezorgd Clyde's vaders zijn.

3082832.title: The Loud House
3082832.description: When Lincoln's mom signs him up for peewee football, Lincoln schemes to have Lynn take his spot. // After Lucy reads Lincoln's fortune and claims his day will 'end in disaster', Lincoln becomes a hypochondriac.

3084340.title: The Loud House
3084340.description: Lincoln has a plan for introducing himself to a new girl, but when the sisters catch him he has to avoid them. // Pop Pop introduces his new girlfriend to the family. She seems great until she starts showing up unannounced.

3094493.title: The Loud House
3094493.description: Lincoln has to get to school on time but getting his sisters out the door proves to be the biggest obstacle of all. // Lincoln is the deciding vote on going to the beach or the amusement park for their family vacation.

3095291.title: The Loud House
3095291.description: Lincoln buys a pair sound-canceling ear buds to drown out the sound of his sisters. // After Lynn and Lucy get in a fight, Lincoln agrees to let Lynn bunk in his room but only for a night!
